title: Jericho
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Jericho.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Jericho'' on patrol with the [[Defiance Task Force|''Defiance'' Task Force]].]]
'''''Jericho''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]-operated [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. At the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and immediately after, it was part of the [[Defiance Task Force|''Defiance'' Task Force]], a group of Rebel ships that had been stationed in the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]] and were trapped there following the Rebels' defeat. Pursued by the Star Destroyer [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] and its task force, the small group of vessels were eventually able to escape. During this time, the ''Jericho'' housed most of the task force's troops.

Following the reconstitution of the ''Defiance'' Task Force, the ''Jericho''{{'s}} exploits are unknown, save that the vessel worked alongside the cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] during the latter ship's operations against the [[Hurrim]] pirate group. The ''Jericho'' led the Rebel [[Battle of Hurrim Base|attack]] on the Hurrim's [[Hurrim Base|base]] of operations, and aided in the eventual destruction of the ''Corrupter''.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Jericho|Jericho]] is a city in [[Wikipedia:State of Palestine|Palestine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
